이런 <|file_sep|>README.md
# Tokenizer

This is a tokenizer for the [BPE](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Byte_pair_encoding) algorithm.

## Usage

```rust
use tokenizer::Tokenizer;

fn main() {
    let tokenizer = Tokenizer::new();
    let tokens = tokenizer.encode("Hello, world!");
    println!("{:?}", tokens);
}
```

## License

This project is licensed under the MIT License.
